channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 ExTV/Podroid (782 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ExTV

📝 Repository: ExTV/Podroid

📄 Descrizione: Rootless Podman for Android — run Linux containers on your phone

]]>

item.title: 📝 sfortis/massdroid_native (42 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sfortis

📝 Repository: sfortis/massdroid_native

📄 Descrizione: Massdroid is a native Android client for Music Assistant, focused on music exploration and discovery. Features include Follow-me mode using BLE fingerprinting, smart recommendations, Last.fm enrichment, similar artists, and Sendspin protocol for phone playback.

⭐ Stelle: 42

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android hilt home-automation jetpack-compose kotlin material-you media-controller multiroom multiroom-audio music-assistant music-player opus smart-home websocket

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-28T13:11:06Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-28T17:18:11Z
